enforcing_agencies: Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation
applicable_to: commercial lodging establishments with 10 or more rooms
all commercial lodging establishments regardless of size
required_topics: How human trafficking takes place in the hospitality industry
Commercial lodging's role in addressing sex trafficking
Identification of hotel contract workers vulnerable to labor trafficking
The role of staff in reporting and responding to human trafficking, including guidance on how to respond to any victims asking for assistance
Contact information for appropriate entities to report human trafficking
Information on the required human trafficking signage
certificate_requirements: date and title of the course
harbor_alliance_actions: Ensure all employees complete annual OAG approved training
Maintain records of completed trainings and certificates
notes: Encouraged but not mandatory for establishments with less than 10 rooms
Multiple training providers are approved, including free options
